query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meeting_participants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  meetingId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT,
  guestEmail VARCHAR(320),
  guestName VARCHAR(255),
  role ENUM('host', 'co_host', 'presenter', 'attendee') DEFAULT 'attendee' NOT NULL,
  inviteStatus ENUM('pending', 'accepted', 'declined', 'tentative') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  leftAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalDuration INT,
  canShareScreen BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  canUnmute BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  canChat BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meeting_participants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  meetingId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT,
  guestEmail VARCHAR(320),
  guestName VARCHAR(255),
  role ENUM('host', 'co_host', 'presenter', 'attendee') DEFAULT 'attendee' NOT NULL,
  inviteStatus ENUM('pending', 'accepted', 'declined', 'tentative') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  leftAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  totalDuration INT,
  canShareScreen BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  canUnmute BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  canChat BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
